Amongst the listed sections, only one directly addresses confidentiality breaches concerning crimes like rape, thus fitting our scenario.
\boxed{A} Based on the available information, Section 228A explicitly deals with offenses related to sexual exploitation and trafficking, making it pertinent to protect the privacy and security of rape victims.
